reviewed_head.subject: Operationalize prompt-registry as a derived retrieval and assembly overlay over canonical control authority

review_scope.limitation: plan is accepted for transition to IMPLEMENT only; runtime artifacts and promotion remain pending

verdict.summary: The prompt-registry loop packet is approved to advance from PLAN to IMPLEMENT on the bounded read-only local overlay pipeline.

findings.summary: The bounded slice is concrete with explicit inputs, outputs, deferred items, and four execution components.
Manifest membership parity is fixed, and derivation rules are explicit and machine-oriented.
A read-only MCP facade is explicitly deferred to a later loop after the local overlay pipeline is proven.

next_patch_set: Open the IMPLEMENT packet for the read-only local overlay pipeline
Emit the four bounded IMPLEMENT artifacts
Keep promotion pending until implement and verify review are complete
